description_long: This sculpture features a tall, cylindrical pedestal adorned with intricate relief carvings of human figures in various poses, encircling the midsection. Atop the pedestal stands a smaller, gold-accented statue of a person holding an object, possibly a shield or a wreath, adding a focal point of interest. The base is a solid rectangular plinth, with a plaque on the front face that appears to contain an inscription. The overall color palette is primarily white with gold highlights on the upper statue, giving it a classical and commemorative appearance. The surface appears to be made of stone or marble, with the gold areas likely painted or gilded. The sculpture is monumental in style and would be a prominent feature in a public or ceremonial space.
description: A tall, white stone sculpture with gold accents, featuring relief carvings of human figures and a prominent upper statue atop a rectangular plinth with a plaque.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plaque on the base and the gold-accented upper statue facing forward, with detailed reliefs visible on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view reveals more of the relief carvings and the gold details on the upper statue, with the plaque not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the relief carvings and the upper statue, with no plaque or inscriptions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights additional relief figures and the gold accents, with the base's side panel visible but unmarked.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be suited for an outdoor public space, such as a plaza, park, or civic square, based on its monumental style and plinth.
